title: Nonlinear Time Series Model Estimation Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative steps involved in estimating parameters for a nonlinear time series model.
relationships: Process starts with defining the model structure and an initial parameter guess, which feeds into an iterative optimization algorithm. The algorithm computes model outputs and residuals, then uses this information to update the parameter estimates. This update loop continues until the convergence criteria are met, at which point the final parameter estimates are produced.
